votes.rationale: Motion-0032 successfully proved the third live execution slice. A verifier-capable execution agent claimed a queue-backed verifier packet, emitted debug.verify evidence, completed the verifier stage, and routed the packet to OPERATOR_REVIEW.

The motion remained appropriately scoped. It extended the governed runtime proof by one lane, preserved operator-governed review, and introduced explicit operator-review routing semantics without collapsing verifier completion into final approval.

The motion is coherent, bounded, and successfully implemented. Required live evidence exists: WORK_CLAIMED, debug.verify, WORK_COMPLETED, and WORK_ROUTED to OPERATOR_REVIEW. The packet UI also reflects verification complete and operator review ready.
